name: Tee Time
about: Detention @ The Elementary is a family entertainment center and restaurant offering indoor golf simulators alongside other activities like laser tag, bumper cars, and arcade games. The facility is powered by TrackMan technology and provides an immersive golf experience with access to over 200 real and fictional courses. Food and drinks can be ordered from the menu and delivered to the bay during kitchen hours. Pricing varies by time of day and is available per bay per hour, with options for standard and cash payments.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art TrackMan simulators with pinpoint accuracy
Access to over 200 world-famous and fictional courses
On-site food and drink service delivered directly to your bay
Option to bring your own alcohol (BYOB)
Private and shared bay options for group play

food_and_drink.notes: Full menu available during kitchen hours; snacks provided; food can be delivered to the bay
BYOB (Bring Your Own Beer) allowed with an additional per hour charge

simulator_hardware.notes: Patented multi-sensor technology with ultra-sensitive radars and inbuilt camera

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You are encouraged to bring your own clubs, but a limited quantity of golf sets are available for rent.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: You can bring your own alcohol (BYOB) for an additional per-hour fee. Food can be ordered from the venue's menu during kitchen hours and will be delivered to your bay.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the time required to play 18 holes, as pricing is based on per-hour bay rental.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Detention @ The Elementary is a family entertainment center designed for all ages, offering various activities alongside golf simulators.
